title: The $50 Billion Reset: Navigating the New Geopolitics of Indo-Canadian Ties
description: In 2018, the Indo-Canadian relationship was labelled a “strategic partnership” with unrealised potential, limited by political tensions during the Trudeau era and insufficient institutional depth. In a CPPR blog that year, I questioned whether the relationship truly qualified as strategic, […] The post The $50 Billion Reset: Navigating the New Geopolitics of Indo-Canadian Ties appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
